name: zutil_zar_register_section_handler
description: zUtil_ZAR::RegisterSectionHandler forwards registration to the active global ZBD manager when one exists.
known_limits: VC5SP3 11.00.7022 /O2 /Ob0 /Zp4 COFF byte compare currently fails for zUtil_ZAR::RegisterSectionHandler: 31 unmasked mismatches after masking 8 relocation bytes; Binary Ninja body is 39 bytes and the VC object body is 48 bytes with 10 trailing VC NOPs trimmed.
The native smoke verifies forwarding to the active global manager and duplicate registration behavior through the manager.
